plugins.name: mosaic-admin
plugins.description: Admin MCP plugin for managing Mosaic Wellness page configs — PDPs, widget pages, experiments, and brand settings via the Zeus admin-mcp server.

plugins.description: Meta Marketing API assistant with a local stdio MCP bridge for ad account discovery, campaign drill-downs, delivery metrics, performance reporting, and async insights jobs.
